description: A fine-tune raises task accuracy while silently destroying general capabilities.
body: Failure mode: training many epochs on a narrow task corpus at a high learning rate raises the task metric but the model forgets general reasoning, instruction following, or safety behavior (catastrophic forgetting). Detection signals: a strong task-eval gain paired with a clear drop on a general-capability or safety holdout, and qualitative breakage on adjacent prompts. Do not ship because the headline task number improved. Safer fallback: switch to low-rank adapters with a small learning rate, blend in general/instruction data, early-stop on the capability holdout, and treat any holdout regression as a blocking gate before release.
